message:
chore: expand gitignore with Codex, rch, beads recovery, clippy, and UBS patterns

Add ignore rules for ephemeral artifacts that accumulate during
multi-agent development sessions:

- .codex/ and .codex-tmp/ (Codex IDE cache and temp directories)
- .rch/ (remote compilation helper cache)
- .beads/.br_recovery/ and .beads/.codex_recovery_*/.codex_snapshot_*
  (auto-generated beads recovery and snapshot directories)
- clippy_*.json, clippy_*.txt (clippy analysis output variants)
- ubs_*.txt, ubs_*.json (UBS scan output variants beyond the existing
  *-ubs.txt and **/ubs.json patterns)
- /connector, /fcp-host (compiled project binaries at repo root)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,3 +147,27 @@ parse_test.rs
 
 # FCP host runtime state (generated by tests and host binary)
 **/.fcp-host/
+
+# Codex IDE cache
+.codex/
+.codex-tmp/
+
+# Remote compilation helper cache
+.rch/
+
+# Beads recovery and snapshot directories
+.beads/.br_recovery/
+.beads/.codex_recovery_*/
+.beads/.codex_snapshot_*/
+
+# Clippy analysis output (all variants)
+clippy_*.json
+clippy_*.txt
+
+# UBS scan output (all variants)
+ubs_*.txt
+ubs_*.json
+
+# Compiled project binaries
+/connector
+/fcp-host
